---
title: "At Sixes and Sevens"
---

## At Sixes and Sevens

**Author:** Alice Weber
**Date:** 1877
**Imprint:** London: Mozley & Smith

### Notes

This was a sequel to the writer\'s [[otherbook:855]\'I Wonder Why\'], which appeared in <i>MP</i> (1874) but not separately.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
